description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge display dominating the front surface, featuring a small centered punch-hole for the front-facing camera. The back is a matte finish with a rectangular camera module in the top left corner, housing multiple lenses and a flash. The sides are slim and appear to be made of metal or high-quality plastic, with visible buttons on the right edge. The device is thin and sleek, with rounded corners and a minimalist design. The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue, green, and purple hues. There are no visible logos or branding on the front or back surfaces.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, matte back, and a multi-lens camera module. The device is thin, with a minimalist design and colorful abstract wallpaper on the screen.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large display with a centered punch-hole camera and a vibrant abstract wallpaper.
description_view_1: Right side view reveals the slim profile and the presence of physical buttons along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view displays a matte surface with a rectangular camera module in the top left corner, containing multiple lenses and a flash.
description_view_3: Left side view highlights the thinness of the device with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue, green, and purple brushstroke patterns. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array with a flash located in a rectangular module at the top left corner on the back. A single front-facing camera is centered at the top of the display in a punch-hole cutout.
attribute_button_layout: There are physical buttons on the right edge, likely including a power button and volume rocker. No buttons are visible on the front or left edge.
